data.title: Encryption in Transit and At Rest
data.description: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data transmission and AES-256 encryption for stored data.

data.title: Threat Detection and Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring and automated responses to detect and mitigate threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning for anomaly detection, paired with security incident event management.

data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Additional security layer to verify user identity beyond passwords.
data.technical_spec: Integrated MFA for user accounts and corporate access.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent evaluations of security posture by internal teams and third-party firms.
data.technical_spec: Vulnerability assessments and penetration testing conducted periodically.

data.title: Data Breach Response Plan
data.description: Predefined procedures to manage and respond to data breaches.
data.technical_spec: Includes isolation protocols, customer communication, and legal compliance measures.
